name: Rich Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Grease and flour an 8-inch round cake pan.
3. In a bowl, mix sugar, cocoa, buttermilk, and vanilla until smooth.
4. Beat egg separately.
5. In another bowl, beat butter with half the sugar until light and creamy.
6. Add the beaten egg to the butter mixture, beating until well combined.
7. Stir in the chocolate mixture.
8. Gradually add flour, baking soda, and salt to the butter mixture, alternating with buttermilk, mixing until just combined.
9. Pour batter into prepared pan.
10. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Let cake cool in pan for a few minutes before turning it out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
12. For glaze: Melt chocolate, cream, and vanilla in a double boiler. Pour over the cooled cake.
Calories per serving: Approximately 350
Servings: 10 Fat grams per serving: Approximately 15
Approx. Cook Time: 30 - 35 minutes
Cholesterol per serving: Approximately 215
